[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100101 3
1 0001100 2
2 0100000 1
3 1011100 4
4 0110111 5
5 0000001 1
6 0100001 2
7 0001100 2

01 10 0000010 1
12 21 0010000 1
23 32 0000001 1 match 5
34 43 0001101 3
45 54 0000001 1 match 5
56 65 1000000 1
67 76 0010100 2
70 07 0000100 1

02 20 0000000 a

24 42 0000001 1 match 5

71 17 0110000 2

03 30 0001110 3
14 41 0000000 a

36 63 0001100 2 match 1 7

50 05 0000000 a
61 16 0010000 1
72 27 0010001 2

15 51 0100000 1 match 2
26 62 1010000 2
37 73 0100101 3 match 0
